李飞飞
李飞飞is an accomplished researcher with a background in various fields, graduating from Princeton University and later earning a PhD from Caltech while holding assistant professor positions at multiple universities.<SEP>李飞飞is an outstanding scholar with a rich academic background, having degrees in multiple disciplines including electrical engineering and computer science.<SEP>李飞飞is a distinguished researcher with a diverse academic background and achievements, particularly in electrical engineering and computer science.

藏药研究
藏药研究, or Tibetan medicine research, is the area of study李飞飞pursued in Tibet after her undergraduate degree.<SEP>藏药研究refers to the study of Tibetan medicine, which李飞飞researched for a year after her graduation.

Cognitive Analysis
Cognitive Analysis refers to the mental process involved in summarizing and reasoning about Li Feifei's academic career and achievements.

Princeton University
Princeton University is the institution from which李飞飞graduated in 1999 with a bachelor's degree.<SEP>Princeton University is an Ivy League university where Li Fei Fei obtained her undergraduate degree and later served as an assistant professor in the computer science department.<SEP>Princeton University is an Ivy League university from which Li Feifei graduated in 1999.

Caltech
Caltech, or the California Institute of Technology, is the university where李飞飞continued her education after Princeton and obtained her PhD in 2005.<SEP>Caltech is known as the institution where李飞飞pursued further studies beginning in 2000 and earned her PhD in 2005.

Tibetan Medicine Research
Tibetan Medicine Research involves the study and investigation of traditional Tibetan medical practices and teachings.

Li Feifei
Li Feifei is a successful researcher in academia, known for her studies in Tibetan medicine and her roles as an assistant professor in multiple universities.<SEP>Li Feifei is an accomplished researcher with a diverse academic background and achievements, known for her impact in computer science and medicinal applications.

Electrical Engineering
Electrical Engineering is the field in which Li Feifei held an assistant professorship, focusing on the study and application of electricity and electronics.

Computer Science
Computer Science is the academic discipline where Li Feifei has contributed as an assistant professor, dealing with the theory and practice of computing.

电机工程, or electrical engineering, is one of the fields in which李飞飞served as an assistant professor.<SEP>电机工程is another discipline in which李飞飞has substantial expertise and has held academic positions.

Interdisciplinary Research
Interdisciplinary Research encompasses李飞飞's work that merges computer science and traditional medicine, generating significant academic interest.

data.content:
Computer Science Department of Princeton University
The Computer Science Department of Princeton University employed李飞飞as an assistant professor from 2007 to 2009.

Li Fei Fei
Li Fei Fei is an outstanding scholar with a rich academic background, having gained expertise in multiple disciplines including electrical engineering, computer science, and Tibetan medicine.

University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
The University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign is where Li Fei Fei worked as an assistant professor in the electrical engineering department from 2005 to 2006.<SEP>University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign is where Li Feifei served as an assistant professor in electrical engineering from 2005 to 2006.

Tibetan Medicine
Tibetan Medicine is a field of study in which李飞飞conducted research during her one-year project in Tibet.

Cross-Disciplinary Research
Cross-Disciplinary Research refers to Li Fei Fei's approach that integrates computer science with traditional medicine, garnering significant interest in academia.

California Institute of Technology
California Institute of Technology, commonly known as Caltech, is where Li Fei Fei pursued further study and earned her PhD in 2005.<SEP>California Institute of Technology is the institution where Li Feifei continued her studies after Princeton and obtained her Ph.D. in 2005.

普林斯顿大学
普林斯顿大学is the institution where李飞飞graduated in 1999 and later served as an assistant professor in the computer science department.

加州理工学院
加州理工学院is where李飞飞pursued further studies after her graduation, obtaining her PhD in 2005.

Research in Tibetan Medicine
Research in Tibetan Medicine relates to Li Feifei's studies conducted in Tibet for one year post-graduation.
